case_title: HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A. VS. PEARLIE ENGLISH

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A. SERVED NOV-16-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ENGLISH, PEARLIE
